meaning: socioeconomic status 社会经济地位
examples: Internal services in JBI are hosted as SEs.
You have seen how to use JBI's tag to configure your BCs and SEs.
SES is especially interesting and offers a good comparison point with the GMail API in GAE.
SES(SYMX) has a 10 year exclusive license to the technology, which can be extended further.
This is the SES site that offers information about the Mexican higher education system.
